description: Set kinematic attributes (position, velocity, displacement, spin) on rblocks within a range.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Use itasca.command('rblock attribute ...') via command interface

keywords.name: damp
keywords.description: Rigid block local damping coefficient where f > 0. By default, f = 0.

keywords.name: density
keywords.description: Rigid block density where f > 0. By default f = 0.

keywords.name: displacement
keywords.description: Accumulated rigid block displacement vector as a result of cycling.

keywords.name: displacement-x
keywords.description: The x -component of the accumulated rigid block displacement as a result of cycling.

keywords.name: displacement-y
keywords.description: The y -component of accumulated displacement as a result of cycling.

keywords.name: displacement-z
keywords.description: The z -component of accumulated displacement as a result of cycling.

keywords.name: euler
keywords.description: Current orientation of Euler angles following the X,Y,Z convention (e.g., rotation about the x -axis followed by rotation about the y’ -axis followed by rotation about the z’‘ -axis) in degrees. The orientation is updated only when orientation tracking has been enabled (see model orientation-tracking command). When active, the current rigid block orientation can be visualized.

keywords.name: euler-x
keywords.description: The x -euler angle (in degrees) of the current rigid block orientation. See the euler keyword for further details.

keywords.name: euler-y
keywords.description: The y -euler angle (in degrees) of the current rigid block orientation. See the euler keyword for further details.

keywords.name: euler-z
keywords.description: The z -euler angle (in degrees) of the current rigid block orientation. See the euler keyword for further details.

keywords.name: force-applied
keywords.description: Force vector applied to rigid blocks.

keywords.name: force-applied-x
keywords.description: The x -component of the applied force.

keywords.name: force-applied-y
keywords.description: The y -component of the applied force.

keywords.name: force-applied-z
keywords.description: The z -component of the applied force.

keywords.name: force-contact
keywords.description: Sum of the contact force accumulated to the rigid blocks during the previous force-displacement update. This value will be modified during the next force-displacement update.

keywords.name: force-contact-x
keywords.description: The x -component of the contact force.

keywords.name: force-contact-y
keywords.description: The y -component of the contact force.

keywords.name: force-contact-z
keywords.description: The z -component of the contact force.

keywords.name: fragment
keywords.description: Fragment ID (see “ Fragment ”).

keywords.name: moi-11
keywords.description: 11 component of the rigid block real moment of inertia. When modified, only the rigid block principal moments of inertia are modified and the other rigid block attributes are not changed. The specification of the rigid block principal moments of inertia via the command line or via FISH results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a rigid block, changing the volume, or changing the density. The fix state can be modified in FISH (see the rblock.moi.fix intrinsic).

keywords.name: moi-12
keywords.description: 12 component of the rigid block real moment of inertia. When modified, only the rigid block principal moments of inertia are modified and the other rigid block attributes are not changed. The specification of the rigid block principal moments of inertia via the command line or via FISH results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a rigid block, changing the volume, or changing the density. The fix state can be modified in FISH (see the rblock.moi.fix intrinsic).

keywords.name: moi-13
keywords.description: 13 component of the rigid block real moment of inertia. When modified, only the rigid block principal moments of inertia are modified and the other rigid block attributes are not changed. The specification of the rigid block principal moments of inertia via the command line or via FISH results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a rigid block, changing the volume, or changing the density. The fix state can be modified in FISH (see the rblock.moi.fix intrinsic).

keywords.name: moi-22
keywords.description: 22 component of the rigid block real moment of inertia. When modified, only the rigid block principal moments of inertia are modified and the other rigid block attributes are not changed. The specification of the rigid block principal moments of inertia via the command line or via FISH results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a rigid block, changing the volume, or changing the density. The fix state can be modified in FISH (see the rblock.moi.fix intrinsic).

keywords.name: moi-23
keywords.description: 23 component of the rigid block real moment of inertia. When modified, only the rigid block principal moments of inertia are modified and the other rigid block attributes are not changed. The fix state can be modified in FISH (see the rblock.moi.fix intrinsic).

keywords.name: moi-33
keywords.description: 33 component of the rigid block real moment of inertia. keywords.name: moi-principal
keywords.description: Real principal moments of inertia. When modified, only the rigid block principal moments of inertia are modified and the other rigid block attributes are not changed. The specification of the rigid block principal moments of inertia via the command line or via FISH results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a rigid block, changing the volume, or changing the density. The fix state can be modified in FISH (see the rblock.moi.fix intrinsic).

keywords.name: moment-applied
keywords.description: Moment applied to rigid blocks.

keywords.name: moment-applied-x
keywords.description: The x -component of the moment applied to rigid blocks.

keywords.name: moment-applied-y
keywords.description: The y -component of the moment applied to rigid blocks.

keywords.name: moment-applied-z
keywords.description: The z -component of the moment applied to rigid blocks.

keywords.name: moment-contact
keywords.description: Sum of the contact moments accumulated to the rigid blocks during the previous force-displacement update. This value will be modified during the next force-displacement update.

keywords.name: moment-contact-x
keywords.description: The x -component of the contact moment.

keywords.name: moment-contact-y
keywords.description: The y -component of the contact moment.

keywords.name: moment-contact-z
keywords.description: The z -component of the contact moment.

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: Location of rigid block centroid.

keywords.name: position-x
keywords.description: The x -component of the location of rigid block centroids.

keywords.name: position-y
keywords.description: The y -component of the location of rigid block centroids.

keywords.name: position-z
keywords.description: The z -component of the location of rigid block centroids.

keywords.name: rotation
keywords.description: Current rigid block orientation. The orientation is updated only when orientation tracking has been enabled (see model orientation-tracking command).

keywords.name: spin
keywords.description: Rigid block angular velocity in radians per second.

keywords.name: spin-x
keywords.description: The x -component of the rigid block angular velocity in radians per second.

keywords.name: spin-y
keywords.description: The y -component of the rigid block angular velocity in radians per second.

keywords.name: spin-z
keywords.description: The z -component of the rigid block angular velocity in radians per second.

keywords.name: velocity
keywords.description: Rigid block translational velocity vector.

keywords.name: velocity-x
keywords.description: The x -component of the rigid block velocity.

keywords.name: velocity-y
keywords.description: The y -component of the rigid block velocity.

keywords.name: velocity-z
keywords.description: The z -component of the rigid block velocity.

keywords.name: volume
keywords.description: Rigid block volume. When modified, only the rigid block mass and real mass are modified and the other rigid block attributes based on volume are not changed. The specification of the volume via the command line or via FISH results in the principal moments of inertia being in a fixed state so that they will not be automatically updated when scaling a rigid block, changing the volume, or changing the density. The fixity state of the inertia can be modified in FISH (see the rblock.moi.fix intrinsic).

keywords.name: damp
keywords.description: Rigid block local damping coefficient where f > 0. By default, f = 0.

keywords.name: density
keywords.description: Rigid block density where f > 0. By default f = 0.

keywords.description: Accumulated rigid block displacement vector as a result of cycling.

keywords.description: The \(x\) -component of the accumulated rigid block displacement as a result of cycling.

keywords.description: The \(y\) -component of accumulated displacement as a result of cycling.

keywords.name: displacement-z
keywords.description: The \(z\) -component of accumulated displacement as a result of cycling.

keywords.name: euler
keywords.description: Current orientation of Euler angles following the X,Y,Z convention (e.g., rotation about the \(x\) -axis followed by rotation about the y’ -axis followed by rotation about the z’‘ -axis) in degrees. The orientation is updated only when orientation tracking has been enabled (see model orientation-tracking command). When active, the current rigid block orientation can be visualized.

keywords.description: The \(x\) -euler angle (in degrees) of the current rigid block orientation. See the euler keyword for further details.

keywords.name: euler-y
keywords.description: The \(y\) -euler angle (in degrees) of the current rigid block orientation. See the euler keyword for further details.

keywords.name: euler-z
keywords.description: The \(z\) -euler angle (in degrees) of the current rigid block orientation. See the euler keyword for further details.

keywords.name: kwd:add
keywords.description: Add f to the existing value.

keywords.name: kwd:gradient
keywords.description: Apply a linear gradient in each of the axes directions starting at the origin.

keywords.description: Apply a linear gradient in the \(x\) -direction starting at the origin.

keywords.description: Apply a linear gradient in the \(y\) -direction starting at the origin.

keywords.description: Apply a linear gradient in the \(z\) -direction starting at the origin.

keywords.name: kwd:multiply
keywords.description: Multiply the existing value by f .

keywords.name: kwd:replace
keywords.description: Replace the existing value with f .
